content:
📢 Source Sheet & Localization Update Announcement

Hello everyone! 👋
Thank you all again for your incredible dedication and hard work on the localization project! We have some important updates regarding the source sheets and the current status of gameplay text translation. 



📜 Latest Source Sheet Now Available!
The **newest version of the source sheet** has been uploaded to the Drive folder. 
This sheet now includes all translations from the 4 pending Pull Requests (PRs), reflecting the latest progress from the entire volunteer and in-house team.
We have uploaded the Source Sheet for all 11 languages individually so it's easier to navigate.
https://drive.google.com/drive/folders/1nyN6CCobUrm48_fCfsMd8JjCSNtWzKZL?usp=sharing

embeds.title: Google Drive: Sign-in
embeds.description: Access Google Drive with a Google account (for personal use) or Google Workspace account (for business use).

content:
🛑 IMPORTANT: Lock on Gameplay Text Translation

As I previously mentioned, due to an ongoing **revamp of our in-game Chinese descriptions** that involves complex coding integration, Light has put the translation editing for Gameplay-Related Text under a hard lock.

This includes all:

**Skill, Talents, Enlightens, Relics, Resonances, Wheel effects, and any text involving numerical gameplay calculations.**

Volunteers are advised to **temporarily stop editing any gameplay-related text in the source sheet**, because your translation progress will be lost when the combat designers change the original Chinese. 
This lock applies to everyone, **including our in-house translation team:** We cannot change gameplay translation text right now either, unless it is a critical mistranslation or typo.

I'll keep everyone updated once we hear more from Light about when the lock will be lifted!

✅ Priorities and Next Steps

We are shifting our focus to **translating the remaining Side Stories** like Psyche Deepdive, Special Ops, Awakener stories, Wheel descriptions, and Communicator messages. 
Please check the latest source sheet for the sections untranslated. Our in-house English team will start from translating Ramona's One Step Away and Ogier's Psyche Deepdive as those are often the ones people go for first. 

If our English volunteers have a certain part of the story they'd like to work on, please let me know!


Thank you for your understanding as we navigate these updates! Please reach out to <@1384428399061106739>  or myself with any questions.
